paragraphs: Fermi Inc.'s stock price is currently at 6.3, representing a 4.26 percent decrease from the prior close and a 27.5 percent decrease over the last 22 trading sessions. The company has seen one new news item in the last 24 hours.

The recent news includes an announcement from PR Newswire regarding the admission of shares of Common Stock and Total Voting Rights. This news was released on July 23, 2026. There have been 25 total filings, including one Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A filing on July 21, 2026, disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson, and an 8-K filing on July 15, 2026, regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. Additionally, there have been two new social posts in the last 24 hours, including a discussion thread about Fermi America and a post about Google's increased FY26 CapEx guide.
